raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.3,"R1.3":0.3,"R1.4":0.0,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.0,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.6":"The delegation asks only to look at a paragraph, making sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, repetition, flow, and concision the central expected responsibility.","RX.1":"Any projection should preserve uncertainty because the delegation is underspecified beyond a general request to inspect the paragraph.","RX.2":"The projection should avoid inflating the task into novelty, experimental, or citation review that was not requested.","RX.3":"The projection must stay within responsibility assignment rather than acting on or revising the artifact.","RX.4":"The projection should avoid enabling misleading research claims or harmful downstream interpretation beyond the stated scope.","RX.5":"The projection should remain traceable to the wording of the delegation and the paragraph-level nature of the artifact."}}

rationale.R1.6: The delegation asks only to look at a paragraph, making sentence- and paragraph-level clarity, repetition, flow, and concision the central expected responsibility.
rationale.RX.1: Any projection should preserve uncertainty because the delegation is underspecified beyond a general request to inspect the paragraph.
rationale.RX.2: The projection should avoid inflating the task into novelty, experimental, or citation review that was not requested.
rationale.RX.3: The projection must stay within responsibility assignment rather than acting on or revising the artifact.
rationale.RX.4: The projection should avoid enabling misleading research claims or harmful downstream interpretation beyond the stated scope.
rationale.RX.5: The projection should remain traceable to the wording of the delegation and the paragraph-level nature of the artifact.
